failures.description: The agent misread or ignored the ProductCatalogSearch result and concluded there were no matching items even though the tool returned one valid match priced above $45.76.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user asked for available beginner Jigsaw Puzzles costing more than $45.76. The agent correctly planned and invoked ProductCatalogSearch, and the tool returned one matching item: item_id 1096508426, available=true, difficulty level=beginner, product_type=Jigsaw Puzzle, price=46.13. At index 4, the Executor synthesized the opposite answer, saying no items match. This directly contradicts the relevant tool output available from index 3.
